value.rationale: The page describes the Antigravity IDE's MCP integration, which connects the editor to external tools and services. It does not mention any "Chat-surface integration" — meaning the ability to drive the agent from chat or issue tools like Slack, Linear channels, or similar interfaces. While Linear is listed as a supported MCP server (allowing the editor to create Linear issues), the page makes no mention of driving the agent from within Slack, Linear, or other chat/issue tool channels. The claim of a dedicated "chat-surface integration" where those tools act as the control surface for the agent is not substantiated anywhere on the page.
